one_line_summary: A robot navigation simulator with IL/RL training tools for teaching robots to navigate using whisker sensors
audience: Students and researchers learning robot navigation, imitation learning, and reinforcement learning
primary_workflows: Launch the simulator, drive the robot using keyboard/gamepad, and generate training logs
Train an MLP neural network from simulator logs using imitation learning
Fine-tune the trained model using PPO reinforcement learning
Benchmark trained models on standardized maps to evaluate performance

components.name: Utility Launcher
components.purpose: Desktop hub that launches all RoboSim tools in separate processes

components.name: Simulator (simulator.py + sim_core.py)
components.purpose: Pygame-based robot navigation simulator with real-time visualization, logging, and model inference

components.name: MLP Trainer (train_mlp.py)
components.purpose: Tkinter GUI for training multi-layer perceptron models from JSONL navigation logs using imitation learning

components.name: PPO Trainer (train_ppo.py)
components.purpose: Tkinter GUI for fine-tuning navigation models using Proximal Policy Optimization with live training plots

components.name: Benchmark GUI (benchmark_gui.py)
components.purpose: Tkinter tool for generating benchmark maps and evaluating model performance on standardized scenarios

components.name: Headless Simulation (headless_sim.py, nav_env.py)
components.purpose: Non-GUI simulation environment for training, compatible with OpenAI Gym interface

screen_candidates.title: Utility Launcher
screen_candidates.purpose: Hub window for launching all RoboSim tools

screen_candidates.title: Simulator Main Window
screen_candidates.purpose: Pygame-based robot navigation simulation with real-time controls and data displays

screen_candidates.title: Simulator Preferences Dialog
screen_candidates.purpose: Settings dialog for history length, log rates, turn parameters, and visualization modes

screen_candidates.title: MLP Trainer
screen_candidates.purpose: GUI for configuring and running imitation learning training on navigation logs

screen_candidates.title: PPO Trainer
screen_candidates.purpose: GUI for PPO reinforcement learning fine-tuning with live metrics and plots

screen_candidates.title: Benchmark Evaluator
screen_candidates.purpose: GUI for generating benchmark maps and evaluating model performance

data_flow_notes: The simulator generates JSONL log files containing robot sensor data (whisker lengths, target bearings) and user actions. The MLP Trainer reads these logs to train neural network policies using imitation learning. The PPO Trainer can warm-start from IL models and fine-tune them using reinforcement learning with headless simulation. The Benchmark GUI evaluates trained models on standardized maps, producing success rates and navigation time metrics. Models are saved as JSON files with weights, biases, and normalization parameters.
